center.name: 查谟专区
center.summary: 查謨專區（Jammu Division）為印度查謨和克什米爾下的一個專區。查謨是查謨區最大的城市。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Gould's sunbird is widely distributed in Eastern Bangladesh, Bhutan, Laos, Myanmar, Nepal, Northern Thailand, India (from Jammu to Arunachal Pradesh), Pakistan (Margalla Hills), Vietnam and Southern China.{{Cite web |title=Mrs
